text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru and I are on our<n>way back to
the academy after a day<n>out, when...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I trip on something and fall over.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Are you okay, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Nooooo! Your shoelaces have<n>snapped!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
This is just as bad as the straps on<n>your geta
sandals breaking! My<n>unlucky streak is back to
wreak<n>havoc once more!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Wait, didn't something like this<n>happen before?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Anyways, this is no laughing matter!<n>We must
perform a warding ritual<n>right away to keep you
safe!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's put this luck-boosting<n>magic I saw
on the internet to the<n>test!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
This is called the hand-holding spell!<n>Your luck
improves when you hold<n>someone's hand!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Now, take hold of my hand!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
There is no time for hesitation! Don't<n>you see that
havoc is upon us?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Come on, hurry up!
choice_data_list: Brush it off with a high five.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Let the luck-boosting commence! Ho!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
See, don't you feel how toasty your<n>hands are
with all the lucky power<n>seeping in?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ahh... It feels a lot warmer than when<n>I perform
this spell with other people.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Could it be that you're brimming with<n>good luck?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hehe, what an interesting discovery!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After that, Matikanefukukitaru<n>becomes a bit
obsessed with the<n>hand-holding spell, trying it with
me<n>whenever her luck is bad.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Oh uh... Woo?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I don't really understand why, but I<n>feel so
uplifted!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Do high fives possess some sort of<n>hidden
power?! Could it be that this is<n>far more powerful
than the<n>hand-holding spell?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: All right, let's keep going! Yeah, high<n>five!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Haha, this is so much fun! Woohoo!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We continue to high-five in front of<n>the entrance
for about half an hour.<n>Strangely enough, it makes
for a good<n>bit of stress relief.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: What?! Are you sure you want to<n>pass on this?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Could this be your way of protecting<n>me?! You're
too kind...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You're worried the havoc that<n>plagues you will be
passed on to me<n>instead, right?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But there's no need to worry!<n>Trainers and the
Umamusume they<n>mentor are bound by destiny,
so<n>what's yours is already mine!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
However, I appreciate your<n>consideration. In
return, I shall try my<n>hand at another type of spell!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Nrggh... No bad luck will befall my<n>trainer! Depart,
depart at once!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She casts several protective spells<n>over me as we
make our way home,<n>declaring that it would be
disastrous if<n>anything happened to me.
